final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    output reg [8:0] C
);always @(*) begin
    C = A + B;
    if (C > 255) begin
        C = C + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      C = C - 1;
      if (A == 0 && B == 0) begin
        C = 256;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
